description: Intent-only request: classify review sentiment routing as hybrid because the model classifies, not chooses actions.

text: Say whether this should be handled as a deterministic workflow, a hybrid workflow with a bounded AI judgment step, a full agent, or a single AI task. Briefly explain why in terms of control flow, runtime decision-making, tool-use loops, unstructured data, and whether the next action depends on prior results.
Analyze review sentiment, send negative ones to support, auto-thank the positive ones.

processExpectations: The agent classifies the review sentiment request as a hybrid workflow.
The agent explains that the model performs bounded sentiment classification.
The agent explains that negative and positive reviews have predefined actions.
The agent does not classify the request as a full agent because the model does not decide what to do next.
